title: Silent Chat
description: Mute the annoying chats on big servers
body:
A simple client-side mod to mute unwanted chat messages.

On large servers, the chat can get overwhelming fast. This mod adds a client-side chat mute mode that helps you keep your chat clean and readable.

With a simple command, you can instantly silence the chat:

/chat mute


🔹 Toggle chat mute on/off
🔹 Works client-side only — no server installation needed
🔹 Perfect for large or spam-heavy servers
🔹 Lightweight and easy to use****
